title: Postaward Management — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar, 2021)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-04-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Postaward Management' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Foundational deck on day-to-day post-award management at MSU; predates the more comprehensive Post Award Quick Guide eTraining (form_post_award_quick_guide_etraining).
